roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
DEFT'S ADD TO CAL FOR CLARIFICATION OF SENTENCE FILED

/CAL:TO CLARIFY SENTENCE/X:ORDER, SIGNED BY JUDGE FLORES, ALLOWING A REPRESENTATIVE OF THE SAN FRANCISCO ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT TO TRANSPORT THEDEFENDANT, FORTHWITH, TO A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT FACILITY ONCE A BED BECOMES AVAILABLE IN LIEU OF THE COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE IMPOSED ON 12-02-14 IS FILED,/

/CAL:SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC1170(H)(5)(B), A SPLIT SENTENCE & DISMISS COUNTS/AJW/DNACOMP/DEF: IS SENTENCED ON COUNT 1 TO 5 YEARS, UPPER TERM/STATES/DEF: SHALL ALSO SERVE THE FOLLOWING ENHANCEMENT TERMS:/X:TOTAL    5YEARS /X:PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)(5)(B), THE SENTENCE IS TO BE SERVED AS FOLLOWS:/CH1:CJ   2Y/CTS:  146/MANSUPCTS:292/PGM10:RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM - SALVATION ARMY/X:TRANSPORTATION ORDER, SIGNED BY JUDGE HITCHENS, ISFILED/MANSUP:3 YEARS/MANSUP1/WS/COA:40/ICNA/VF4:300/PSR/BKFEE/11590/LFNEW/COLLECT/4019HALF/REMA/
/CAL:STATUS OF PROGRAM/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEAOF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 11-10-14/ARBUCKLE/VD:PRELIM HRG/
/CAL:DEFENDANT'S ADD TO CALENDAR MOTION TO CLARIFY SENTENCE/CONTD:TO CLARIFY SENTENCE/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONTD:STATUS OF PROGRAM ON 10-10-14/DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 10-21-14/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET & DA MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE/MO GRTD/X:CONSOLIDATED FELONY COMPLAINT IS FILED/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:TO JOIN 14018340/X:NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE IS FILED/SHER/SHER2:07-10-14/BAIL:75000/CONTD:TO SET/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LD: FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 07-21-14/987,2/OR/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
